mapper.select: select used_days as "used_days", remaining_days as "remaining_days" from annual_leave where users_id = #{users_id}
SELECT TOTAL_DAYS, USED_DAYS, REMAINING_DAYS FROM ANNUAL_LEAVE WHERE USERS_ID = #{loginId} AND YEAR = TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY'))
mapper.update: update annual_leave set used_days = #{used_days}, remaining_days = #{remaining_days} where users_id = #{users_id}
mapper.select: select u.id, to_char(u.hire_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as hire_date, a.leave_seq, a.used_days from users u join annual_leave a on u.id = a.users_id where floor(months_between(sysdate, u.hire_date)) < 12 and a.year = extract(year from sysdate)
mapper.update: update annual_leave set total_days = #{total_days}, remaining_days = #{remaining_days} where leave_seq = #{leave_seq}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM USERS u JOIN DEPARTMENTS d ON u.DEPT_SEQ = d.DEPT_SEQ JOIN ANNUAL_LEAVE a ON u.ID = a.USERS_ID
a.YEAR = TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY'))
AND (TO_CHAR(u.USERS_SEQ) LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR u.NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR d.DEPT_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
